rationale: The citing paper references Dube, Hitsch, and Rossi (2009) once in the introduction as part of a grouped related-literature citation on consumer-side switching costs and pricing dynamics. The citation serves to position this paper's focus on firm-side repositioning costs as complementary to prior work, but the cited study is not discussed in detail. The citing paper does not borrow its specific framework, estimation strategy, measures, or findings from that paper in the core model or results sections.
